author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Voices of Princess Zelda and Sonic on 40 Years of Their Franchises - IGN Live 2026
Roger Craig Smith and Patricia Summersett, the voices of Sonic and Princess Zelda from the Breath of the Wild games, came to IGN Live 2026 to share the 35th anniversary of Sonic and the 40th anniversary of Zelda. Speaking with Jeffrey Vega, the two game voice actors shared some stories from iconic moments, what it's like to be part of such iconic franchises, and even drew in Hylian!

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Frosty Games Fest 2026
World premiere announcements and updates from 50+ of the coolest upcoming games made in Australia and Aotearoa New Zealand, broadcasting live as part of Summer Game Fest on June 7 AEST and June 6 PT

#IGN #Gaming #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
EXODUS - Official Extended Gameplay Reveal
The Extended Gameplay Reveal is the most comprehensive look at EXODUS you’ve seen yet. This is Jun Aslan’s journey across the Centauri Cluster. You’re a scrappy salvager turned Traveler pulled into the fight of your life, leading a crew of unforgettable companions across the most dangerous reaches of space, and exploring ancient ruins for what could save your homeworld from the Rot, a Celestial virus driving humanity toward extinction. EXODUS is coming to PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC, and will be available in early 2027.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Cozy Game Restoration - Official Release Date Trailer | Frosty Games Fest 2026
Check out the Release Date Trailer for Cozy Game Restoration, a cozy restoration simulation collectathon game developed by Parasol Corp. Players will gently bring forgotten video game cartridges back to life. Tear wrapping paper, peel old stickers, lift away grime, and transform dusty relics into cherished collectibles. No pressure or failure, just the quiet joy of restoring memories. Cozy Game Restoration is launching on September 24 for PC (Steam).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Appulse - Official Announcement Trailer
Check out the announcement trailer for Appulse, an upcoming pinball roguelite shooter game by Le Rado. In Appulse, you are challenged to master flippers and weapon recoil to control movement, craft powerful builds, and climb the leaderboard in a vibrant intergalactic war. Navigate the board, unlock game-changing perks, and lead the Vektor Dynamics fleet to victory against the Iron Accord. Appulse will be available on PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dark Deity 3 | Indie Loop Showcase - IGN Live 2026
This is the official world premiere of Dark Deity 3, the final chapter in the indie fan-favorite **RPG series**! Terrazael is running out of time as the God of Death approaches. Lead the charge in the final war featuring a unique dual-army narrative following Gwyn and Arthur Sildarian.

Experience the most ambitious Dark Deity story yet, packed with massive turn-based strategy depth: 28 playable units, 72 classes, over 100 weapons, 60+ build-defining rings, and a built-in randomizer for endless replayability. Watch fully voiced story sequences with custom in-game manga panels for major story beats!

Presented by Dark Deity 3.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
DDoD | Indie Loop Showcase - IGN Live 2026
Check out the IndieLoop Live showcase for DDoD! This is an intense new top-down roguelite shooter where you volunteer to face a corrupting force known as "the Fog."

Explore a dynamic, warped weather system featuring real-world topography across swamps, industrial ruins, and dense forests. Whether you go in solo or team up with up to 3 friends in co-op, you'll need to customize your weapons with elemental mods, take on side quests, and upgrade your loadout to survive the mutated creatures waiting for you. Over 50,000 playtesters have already jumped into the DDoD demo— but the question remains... Do you have what it takes to reach the Source?

Presented by DDoD.

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Enginefall | Indie Loop Showcase - IGN Live 2026
In the future, humanity’s final refuge amidst the post-apocalyptic wasteland is aboard colossal megatrains. Only some bold survivors have escaped to become Freerailers - nomads who roam the rails using their Dagger shuttle on a constant hunt to steal fuel and resources from the Titans they once called home. 

It’s up to you and your crew to take back what you’re owed. Board, scavenge, craft, build, and fight your way to First Class.

Enginefall’s open playtest runs from June 8th to the 14th, and will be available as a Steam Next Fest demo starting on June 15th.

Presented by Enginefall.

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Gemini X - Official Announcement Trailer
The Heretechs have seized Gemini Colony! Take a look at the Gemini X announcement trailer for this upcoming single-player action-exploration platformer that blends the familiarity of the metroidvania genre with run-and-gun combat inspired by games from the 32-bit era. Gemini X will be available on PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Little Nightmares 3 - Official The Backstage DLC Announcement Trailer
Some secrets may be better left behind the curtain. Why is it so tempting to peek, though? Check out the latest Little Nightmares 3 trailer to see what to expect with The Backstage DLC for the co-op horror adventure game. In Little Nightmares 3, you follow the journey of Low and Alone, two best friends in search of a way out of the Nowhere. In 2 players online cooperation or solo with an A.I., work together to solve puzzles and survive in this nightmarish world. The Backstage DLC for Little Nightmares 3 arrives on PC, PlayStation 5 (PS5), PlayStation 4 (PS4), Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, and Xbox on June 12 as part of the Secrets of The Spiral Expansion Pass.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Wardogs - Official Gameplay Trailer
Take a look at gameplay from Wardogs in this latest trailer for the upcoming tactical all-out warfare FPS. 100 players and three rival teams fight to take control, grab the cash, and survive long enough to bank it. Wardogs will be available on in Steam Early Access in 2026.
